_README: This file is HAND-EDITED ONLY. No script writes to it.
Each ratio enforces a structural property of PowDB that should not silently degrade.
Raising a ceiling means the thesis gave ground — justify it in the commit message.

powql_point_over_btree_lookup.meaning: Full PowQL parser+planner+executor overhead over the raw B-tree probe. This is THE thesis metric. Smoke bench (2026-04-06) measured 2641ns / 1237ns = 2.14x. Ceiling 2.5 leaves ~17% headroom for incidental overhead but not enough to hide a planner regression that un-folds .field=literal into SeqScan+Filter.
